meaning: n.出售,卖出,贱卖,廉价出售,销路,销售额
examples: Tickets go on sale this week.
They've put their house up for sale.
I'm sorry, it's not for sale.
Credit Suisse , Bank of America , Citigroup and UBS are organizing the stock sale.
Yet to Sale's credit, they repelled wave after wave of Northampton pressure on their line.
